allow: Bash(echo 'import { describe, it, expect } from ""vitest""; describe\(""minimal"", \(\) => { it\(""works"", \(\) => { expect\(1+1\).toBe\(2\); }\); }\);')

Bash(echo 'import { describe, it, expect } from ""vitest""; import { getTerrainModifier } from ""./engine/combat""; describe\(""import"", \(\) => { it\(""works"", \(\) => { expect\(getTerrainModifier\(""Mountain""\)\).toBe\(5\); }\); }\);')

Bash(echo 'import { describe, it, expect } from ""vitest""; import type { CombatParams } from ""./types""; describe\(""types"", \(\) => { it\(""imports"", \(\) => { const p: CombatParams = { attackerStrength: 1, defenderStrength: 1, fortBonus: 0, terrainModifier: 0, seed: 1 }; expect\(p\).toBeDefined\(\); }\); }\);')
